name: Cado Security
description: Cado Security — Cloud forensics and incident response platform for automated evidence collection and investigation in AWS, Azure, and GCP.

seo.title: Cado Security — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Cado Security: Cado Security — Cloud forensics and incident response platform for automated evidence collection and investigation in AWS, Azure, and GCP.

when_to_use: Automated cloud forensics and incident response in AWS/Azure/GCP
Evidence collection for post-breach investigation in multi-cloud environments
Rapid triage of compromised EC2 or container workloads
Compliance-grade forensic capture for SOC teams handling cloud incidents

pros: Automated cloud forensics across AWS, Azure, GCP
Fast evidence collection for incident response
Fits regulated orgs needing chain of custody
cons: Security/IR tool; not traditional crash reporting
review.verdict: Great for cloud IR and forensics, but the wrong tool if you actually need app crash reporting.
review.best_for: Cloud security teams doing forensics and incident response
review.not_for: App developers looking for crash reports and stack traces
